case_title: CASTRO, JUAN et al vs. PETERSON, KAREN JANE et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CASTRO, JUAN MARTINEZ, JUAN GABRIEL AS TO DEFENDANT PETERSON, KAREN JANE DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-03-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-15-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-03-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-03-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-05-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-05-1994, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $50.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-05-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), SANCTIONS OF $50.00 FOR BOTH CASTRO AND MARTINEZ., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-07-1994 CONTINUED FROM JAN-05-1994 TO MAR-07-1994 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
